name: orphaned-annotation-repair
description: convertAnchorToPoint uses raw SQL ::jsonb cast. Router requires editor role. AnnotationContent onconverttopoint prop only passed when featureDeleted===true.

name: annotation-geojson-export
description: Annotation GeoJSON export: anchorToGeometry maps point/region/measurement anchors to GeoJSON Geometry, returns null for feature/viewport anchors (no standalone geometry). annotationsToFeatureCollection converts AnnotationObject[] to FeatureCollection with text extraction from single and slotted content. Route at /api/export/annotations/[mapId] reuses annotationService.list for access control.

name: changelog-read-api
description: Changelog read API: getChangelog uses cursor-based pagination keyed on (created_at, id) DESC with limit+1 pattern. getChangelogMapId resolves map ownership from changelog table (not annotation_objects) so access control works even after annotation deletion. Router procedure uses requireMapAccess(viewer) for read access.
